character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: Mother of the narrator, present during the captain's injury and involved in caring for the family.

character_dossiers.name: Doctor Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Doctor who visits the narrator's father and assists the injured captain.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Injured sailor with tattoos and a history of drinking rum, referred to by multiple names.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Narrator and son of the mother, assists in caring for the captain.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Individual referred to as 'the doctor' in the text, possibly distinct from Doctor Livesey.
